## Description

<!-- Describe what this PR changes and why. If it adds/changes a tag or
schema, include a short MML example and its compiled output. -->

## Related Issue(s)

<!-- Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #12" or "Relates to #34" -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New tag / schema (adds or modifies semantic tags or validation rules)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior/syntax)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / tooling / chore (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or my
      feature works (including both valid and invalid MML cases, where
      applicable)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, SPEC, tag reference)
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] My commits follow the project's commit message format
